name: Nomadar Corp.
summary: PART I Background We were incorporated in the State of Delaware in August 2023 as Sportech City USA, Corp, and changed our name to Nomadar Corp. in December 2023 (Nomadar or the Company). We are a subsidiary of Sport City Cdiz, S.L. (Sportech). Sportech is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Cdiz Club de Ftbol, S.A.D., a Spanish professional soccer club based in Cdiz, Andalusia (Cdiz CF) that competes in Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Segunda Divisin, better known as the Segunda Divisin (Segunda Divisi...
